title: Sātkhira Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sātkhira, with a Z-Score of +3.86. The score is 10.0/10, indicating a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Sātkhira is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 76%, and the wind speed is 11.9 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of cooling, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, is exacerbating the situation.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
